mapper.select: SELECT id, pattern, replacement, description, category, enabled, priority, created_at, updated_at FROM regex_rules WHERE enabled = true ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC

SELECT id, pattern, replacement, description, category, enabled, priority, created_at, updated_at FROM regex_rules WHERE enabled = true AND category = #{category} ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regex_rules (pattern, replacement, description, category, enabled, priority, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{pattern}, #{replacement}, #{description}, #{category}, #{enabled}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE regex_rules SET pattern = #{pattern}, replacement = #{replacement}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE regex_rules SET enabled = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE regex_rules SET enabled = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
